sessions_sample.raw: Your biggest week of training tops out at four hours and five minutes of running over five days; in addition, there is one 50-minute cross-training session.
sessions_sample.parsing_note: Duration is provided in hours and minutes, which may not be directly convertible to distance.

sessions_sample.raw: By the end of the program, you will run for 75 minutes continuously.
sessions_sample.parsing_note: Duration is given instead of distance, which is not standard.

sessions_sample.raw: We have included 15-minute circuits to be completed two times a week; you can always do more of them if you’d like.
sessions_sample.parsing_note: Strength training sessions are mentioned without specific days or distances.

unhandled_patterns.issue: The parser may not recognize mixed duration formats as valid input for distance.
unhandled_patterns.suggested_rule: Allow durations expressed in hours and minutes to be treated as valid session durations.

unhandled_patterns.issue: The parser may not convert durations to distance correctly when only time is provided.
unhandled_patterns.suggested_rule: If only duration is provided, store it as duration_minutes and set distance to null.

prompt_improvements: Recognize and handle durations expressed in hours and minutes as valid session durations.
If a session specifies only a duration without a distance, store the duration in duration_minutes and set distance to null.
anomalies: The plan does not provide specific daily sessions, making it difficult to assign activities to specific days of the week.
